advancements.potions-n-rituals.albedo.de: Wash away impurities and brew your first potions
advancements.potions-n-rituals.citrinita: Channel Nether energies to forge your first talismans and artifacts
advancements.potions-n-rituals.nigredo.d: Delve into chaos and create the Primordial Matter
advancements.potions-n-rituals.rubedo.de: Achieve absolute perfection by performing great worldly rituals
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.albedo.body: Albedo marks the beginning of purification. Once the Materia Prima is obtained, you will learn to dissolve and bind it to infuse volatile essences. This is the art of designing advanced alchemical Potions with unsuspected virtues.
Citrinitas pushes matter towards its crystallization and awakening. By capturing the volatile effects of your potions to fix them into matter, you will become able to forge magical Talismans and Artifacts transmitting permanent powers.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.nigredo.bod: Nigredo is the phase of decomposition and extraction. It is here that you separate the basic components of the world to isolate the three fundamental principles: Sulfur, Mercury, and Salt, in order to shape the Materia Prima.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.opus.body: The fulfillment of the Art is divided into four major successive stages. This first volume lays the foundations of your journey. Understanding the order of the works is the key to not getting lost in the twists and turns of creation.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.opus.title: The Way of the Alchemist
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.rubedo.body: The ultimate achievement and absolute mastery of the Great Work. Rubedo is the culmination where all your knowledge merges. By combining matter, fluids, and your artifacts, you can erect powerful Rituals capable of bending reality to your will.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.toc2: Click on a section to begin:
book.potions-n-rituals.page.acid.brew: Mix a §2rotten flesh§r and a §2poison potion§r to get a highly toxic mixture.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.acid.resume:
Substance highly §2toxic§r,

Use with precaution.

Can cause indigestion.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.active_telep: The fluidity of a §7mercury ball§r stabilizes the chaotic effects of a §7teleportation potion§r.
Instantly teleports you, whenever you want, to the exact spot you are looking at (within range).
A §5blink of an eye§r and you're there.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.adhesion.bre: Find something sticky, maybe like §2resin§r. Mix it with an §2awkward potion§r, it should be sufficient.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.adhesion.exp:
You stick to surfaces, allowing you to walk on walls.

Very useful for repelling away spiders.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alchemist.br: Take an alchemist item like the §6mercury ball§r and an §6awkward potion§r to achieve that dream.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alchemist.re:
The dream of every alchemist,

§7coal§r that become §6gold§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alcohol.brew: Mix §2sweet berries§r and an §2awkward potion§r, to get some liquor.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alcohol.expl:
Gives entity a feeling of loss.

You §2lose control§r, yet everything seems so §2funny§r !
book.potions-n-rituals.page.asthma.brew: The brewing formula for this terrible concoction has been §7lost to time§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.asthma.expla: Reduces your oxygen bar if you run, even in the open air. Inflicting suffocation damage if you run out of air.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.berserk.brew: The heat of a §7torchflower§r infused in an §7awkward potion§r will awaken your inner rage.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.berserk.expl: Your physical strength and speed are multiplied, your adrenaline prevents you from dying, but beware of the backlash.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.berserk.resu:
Nothing else matters but blood.

§cValhalla§r might open its doors.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.brainwashing: A §7zombie brain§r macerated in an §7awkward potion§r is enough to take control of their docile minds.

Allows you to rally undead monsters to your cause. They will attack your enemies.

Villagers will mix up their prices.

And you, you will lose your footing.
They will listen to you, no questions asked.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.clumsiness.b: The brewing formula for this chaotic potion has been §7lost to time§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.clumsiness.e: Forces the target to randomly drop the items they are holding in their hands.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.cold.brew: A mundane §7snowball§r melted in an §7awkward potion§r will cool anyone's ardor.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.cold.explana: You cough randomly, transmitting your disease to other entities.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.darkness.bre: An ink sac mixed with an awkward potion is great to mimic the effect.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.darkness.exp:
You lose your sight, everything turn black.

There is just one thing to remember...

§4RUN§r

He's close...
book.potions-n-rituals.page.darkness.res: Everything disappear, only the §7void§r keep showing itself.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.death.brew: Reverse the miracle of the §7resurrection potion§r by dipping a cruel §7Wither rose§r into it.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.death.explan: Inflicts massive and unavoidable damage that consumes life force until death ensues.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.death.resume:
There is no escape.

It is §8the definitive stop§r...
book.potions-n-rituals.page.double_healt: The abundance of a §7golden apple§r combined with a §7strong healing potion§r considerably strengthens your vitality.
Instantly doubles your maximum health bar; it is a life that §cabsorbs§r damage but does not regenerate.

Twice as hard to kill.

A second §csurge of life§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.dwarf.brew: It is enough to corrupt a §7giant potion§r with a §7fermented spider eye§r to reverse the growth.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.dwarf.explan: Drastically reduces your size. You can sneak in anywhere, but your reach is ridiculous.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.dwarf.resume:
Watch where you step!

You are now §3three apples§r tall.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.fire_resista: Melt a §7magma cream§r in an §7awkward potion§r to ignore the heat of this world.

Completely immunizes you against fire, lava, and burning damage.

Ideal for a trip to the Nether.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.frost.brew: Plunge a §7snowball§r into a §7cold potion§r to obtain a truly biting cold.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.frost.explan: Inflicts continuous cold damage and drastically slows the target's movements.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.frost.resume:
Your joints freeze up.

It's cold, isn't it?
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ghost_walk.b: The sadness of a §7Ghast tear§r distilled in an §7awkward potion§r partially dematerializes you.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ghost_walk.e: Allows you to pass through solid blocks as if you were a true specter, but you have considerably reduced vision.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.giant.brew: A simple pinch of §7bone meal§r in an §7awkward potion§r is enough to stimulate unnatural growth.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.giant.explan: You grow disproportionately, which increases your reach but makes you an easier target.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.giant.resume:
Watch out for low ceilings...

Do not look down upon the world from §3above§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.glowing.brew: A §6Night Vision Potion§r allow you to see in the dark while a §6glow berry§r make you glow... pretty straight forward.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.glowing.expl: Make entity §6glow§r so that you can see them in the dark and behind walls.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.glowing.resu:
It's a bit dark in here...

But I can §6see§r you very well
book.potions-n-rituals.page.harming.brew: Pervert a §7healing potion§r using a §7fermented spider eye§r to turn the cure into a deadly poison.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.harming.expl:
Inflicts instant magical damage that ignores most armors.

§aHeals undead creatures.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.haste.brew: Cat dig a lot, so a §6claw§r with an §6awkward potion§r might give you the potion
book.potions-n-rituals.page.haste.explan:
You can mine everything §6faster§r,

really really §6fast§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.healing.brew: The radiant juice of a §7glistering melon slice§r infused in an §7awkward potion§r closes your wounds on the spot.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.healing.expl:
Instantly restores a portion of your health points.

§4Hurts§r undead creatures.
Corrupting a §7water breathing potion§r with a §7fermented spider eye§r will make every drop of water deadly.
Inflicts heavy continuous damage if the target comes into contact with water or rain.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ignition.bre: Corrupt a §7fire resistance potion§r with a §7fermented spider eye§r to obtain the opposite effect.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ignition.exp:
Instantly immolates the entity, causing it to burn without any external heat source.

But allows throwing §6fireballs§r on command.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ignition.res: It's getting §6hot§r all of a sudden, isn't it?
book.potions-n-rituals.page.infinity.bre: This divine power can only be obtained through §5advanced alchemy§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.infinity.exp: Your active effects take on an infinite duration, but you lose 2 hearts per effect.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.invisibility: Corrupt a §7night vision potion§r with a §7fermented spider eye§r to trick light itself.

Makes your body completely invisible to the eyes of others.

§4Be careful, your armors and held items remain visible.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.leaping.brew: The luck of a §7rabbit foot§r infused in an §7awkward potion§r will put springs under your feet.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.leaping.expl: Significantly increases your jump height and reduces the fall damage you take.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.leaping.resu: Gravity has less grip on you.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.levitation.b: A §3Slow Falling potion§r with a §3feather§r should be good enough to lighten your burden.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.levitation.e:
You fall slowly, so slowly that you don't take fall damage.

It's like you are on the §3Moon§r.

§4Be careful, it only last a moment.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.levitation.r: Gravity is a weight on the shoulders, forget it
book.potions-n-rituals.page.liquid_walke: Boil a §7lily pad§r in an §7awkward potion§r to learn how to defy the physics of liquids.

Allows you to walk on water.

To walk on lava, you will need a stronger version.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.long_cooldow: Corrupt a §7short cooldown potion§r with a §7fermented spider eye§r to slow down your reflexes.
Drastically increases the cooldown time for using potions and activating active effects. They require a colossal effort.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.long_leg.bre: The flexibility of a piece of §7bamboo§r in an §7awkward potion§r will lengthen your stride.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.long_leg.exp: Allows you to step over blocks without having to jump, as if you were on stilts.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.long_leg.res: Giant steps in a human body.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.love.brew: The delicate scent of a §7poppy§r infused in an §7awkward potion§r softens tempers.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.love.explana: Active effect that allows you to §dbreed§r with any species.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.magnetism.br: The attraction of a heavy §7iron ingot§r plunged into an §7awkward potion§r magnetizes your body.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.magnetism.ex: Sucks up all dropped items located in a wide radius around you.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.magnetism.re: Everything comes to those who know how to attract.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.masking.brew: Sublimate a simple §7invisibility potion§r with a §7fermented spider eye§r to twist your vision of reality.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.medusa.brew: Catalyze a strong §7petrification potion§r with §7Materia Prima§r to transmit the curse.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.medusa.expla: Petrifies, if you wish, any entity that meets your gaze.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.medusa.resum:
Do not look her in the eyes!

She has looks that §2kill§r...
book.potions-n-rituals.page.midas.brew: Amplifying an §7alchemist potion§r with §7Materia Prima§r makes transmutation uncontrollable.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.midas.explan: Transforms armors and weapons into their golden versions...
book.potions-n-rituals.page.mining_fatig: You reverse the §4potion of haste§r with a §4fermented spider eye§r

Wow, it's a §7hard stone§r ! 

I can't break it.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.night_vision: Bite into the power of a §7golden carrot§r distilled in an §7awkward potion§r to pierce the darkness.
Illuminates the area around you, allowing you to see perfectly in total darkness and underwater.
The darkness no longer holds any secrets from you.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.no_interacti: Corrupt a §7brainwashing potion§r with a §7rabbit foot§r to become completely powerless.
Prevents you from breaking blocks, opening chests, or hitting entities.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.oblivion.bre: Plunge a §7pitcher plant§r into an §7awkward potion§r to create a powerful liquid amnesic.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.oblivion.exp: Empties a part of your inventory.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.oblivion.res:
Where am I? Who am I?

It is the §5great void.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ore_sense.br: The alliance of an §7iron ore§r and a §7night vision potion§r will sharpen your underground senses.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.ore_sense.ex: You can sense precious ores through the rock, which facilitates your mining sessions.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.paranoia.bre: The brewing formula to alter the mind like this has been §5lost to time§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.paranoia.exp: Makes the target hear terrifying monster sounds that do not exist.
This powerful elixir can only be §cobtained through alchemical rituals§r that are long, obscure, and costly.
Permanently increases your maximum number of hearts.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.perm_speed.b: The absolute mastery of movement is a magic §bobtained only through complex alchemical rituals§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.perm_speed.e:
Permanently increases your base movement speed.

Your legs will never get tired again.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.perm_speed.r: Fast, in every moment of your life.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.perm_strengt: Such raw power must be §cobtained through alchemical rituals§r of absolute precision and danger.

Permanently increases the power of all your melee strikes.

Nothing will be able to resist you anymore.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.petrificatio: Melt some §7obsidian§r in a §7Turtle Master potion§r to permanently freeze movement.
Turns your limbs into stone. You can no longer move, but your defense is greatly increased, you feel nothing anymore.

Impossible to move a single finger.

But she was so beautiful...
book.potions-n-rituals.page.photosynthes: Crush some §7leaves§r in an §7awkward potion§r to assimilate the strength of plants.
Slowly restores your hunger as long as you stand in direct sunlight.

The sun is your best meal.

You are fed by the §adivine star§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.poison.brew: Macerate a §7spider eye§r in an §7awkward potion§r to extract its toxic venom.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.poison.expla: Inflicts regular damage over time, but cannot kill you. The effect stops at half a heart.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.poison.resum: A bitter taste that eats away at you from the inside.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.purification: A §7milk bucket§r concentrated and stabilized in an §7awkward potion§r will purge your organism.
Instantly cleanses all negative effects without touching your active bonuses.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.reactivation: The solar power of a §7sunflower§r added to a §7short cooldown potion§r forces destiny.
Adds extra time to all active effects.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.reality_chec: The brewing formula to break the fourth wall has been §5lost to time§r.
Instantly dispels all illusions. Your inventory is full, so you are heavy.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.regeneration: Let a §7Ghast tear§r weep in an §7awkward potion§r to stimulate your natural healing.
Progressively restores your health points over time without needing to eat.
Your wounds close up before your eyes.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.resonance.br: Grind an §7echo shard§r into powder in an §7awkward potion§r to awaken this ability.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.resonance.ex: You transmit your active effects to entities that are within a certain distance.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.resonance.re: You emit a certain wave; entities imitate it.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.resurrection: The essence of a §7Totem of Undying§r diluted in an §7awkward potion§r allows you to cheat death once more.
If you take a fatal blow under this effect, you are instantly brought back to life with a portion of your health.

Death is but a setback.

It is all about tricking the §dreaper§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.rust.brew: Dissolve an §7oxidation fragment§r in an §7awkward potion§r to create this scourge of metal.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.rust.explana: Rapidly eats away the durability of the affected entity's armor.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.saturation.b: The natural sugar of a §7beetroot§r concentrated in an §7awkward potion§r will curb your appetite for good.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.saturation.r: A §cfeast§r fit for a king in one gulp.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.short_cooldo: The energy of a §7sunflower§r infused in an §7awkward potion§r will boost your dexterity.
Drastically decreases the cooldown time for using potions and activating active effects. They require so little effort.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.slow_falling: The remains of a nocturnal hunter, a §7Phantom membrane§r, diluted in an §7awkward potion§r will lighten your body.
Significantly slows your falling speed, making you completely immune to landing damage.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.slowness.bre: The corruption of a §7swiftness potion§r by a §7fermented spider eye§r will deprive you of all your momentum.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.slowness.exp: Greatly decreases your movement speed and slightly reduces your field of vision.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.strength.bre: The heat of §7Blaze powder§r added to an §7awkward potion§r will multiply your muscular strength.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.strength.exp: Considerably increases the damage dealt by your melee attacks.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.strength.res: You feel capable of moving mountains.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.stun.brew: The electric shock of a §7charged copper§r block released into an §7awkward potion§r stuns for sure.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.stun.explana: Partially paralyzes the entity for a short moment, preventing it from taking any action.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.swiftness.br: The energy of a simple piece of §7sugar§r dissolved in an §7awkward potion§r accelerates your heart rate.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.swiftness.ex: Increases your movement speed and slightly widens your field of vision.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.swiftness.re: The wind blows in your ears.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.teleportatio: The natural instability of an §7Ender pearl§r diluted in an §7awkward potion§r causes leaps in space.

Teleports you randomly.

But if you have a stronger version, you will be teleported home for sure.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.thorns.brew: The juice of a §7cactus§r squeezed into an §7awkward potion§r will harden your epidermis.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.thorns.expla: Grows thorns on your skin. Enemies who strike you in melee take damage.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.turtle_maste: Boil a §7turtle shell§r in an §7awkward potion§r to adopt the wisdom and sturdiness of the reptile.
Drastically reduces your movement speed, but grants you unwavering resistance to physical damage.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.unstable.bre: If you mess around with your recipes, you risk creating this potion.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.unstable.exp: Extremely unstable effect, you have a high chance of exploding. One thing is certain: nothing good comes from this effect.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.vampirism.br: A macabre §7blood bag§r mixed with an §7awkward potion§r awakens the thirst for hemoglobin.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.vampirism.ex: A portion of the damage you inflict on your enemies is returned to you as health points, but you burn in the sun.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.vampirism.re:
Their pain is your cure.

§cBlood for blood.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.water_breath: Inflate an §7awkward potion§r with a §7pufferfish§r to breathe like an inhabitant of the oceans.
Prevents your oxygen bar from depleting underwater, allowing you to stay submerged indefinitely.

Your lungs adapt to the depths.

§bEphemeral gills.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.weakness.bre: The mold of a §7fermented spider eye§r diluted in a simple vial of §7water§r weakens any organism.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.weakness.exp:
Considerably reduces the damage you inflict in melee.

Useful for curing zombie villagers.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_boost.bre: The wisdom contained in §7Lapis Lazuli§r is released when plunged into an §7awkward potion§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_boost.exp: Drastically increases the amount of experience you harvest from any source.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_boost.res: Every lesson is carved in stone.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_life.brew: The crossing of a §7glistering melon slice§r and an §7XP boost potion§r converts mind into flesh.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_life.expl:
Your life is replaced by your experience bar.

Knowledge becomes your flesh!
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_life.resu: Your knowledge flows in your veins.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.xp_reduction: The bitterness of a §7fermented spider eye§r alters the properties of an §7XP boost potion§r.
Drastically decreases the amount of experience you harvest from any source.
Twice the work for the same experience.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.zeus.brew: Combine mystical §7Materia Prima§r with a §7stun potion§r to summon lightning.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.zeus.explana: Your attacks invoke the wrath of §bZeus§r upon the target, you can also invoke it manually.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.zombie_conta: The corruption of §7rotten flesh§r left to rot in an §7awkward potion§r.
You are infected by the zombie contagion, you will soon turn into a zombie.

You have been bitten...

There is no escape.
Runes can only be used on blocks
item.potions-n-rituals.alchemy_guide_bas: Magnus Opus: The Foundations of Alchemy
message.potions-n-rituals.alchemical_bag: The laws of alchemy forbid opening a pocket dimension within another...
splash.potionsnrituals.thanks: Thank you for supporting me LivelyBadGood
tooltip.potions-n-rituals.talisman_charg: The talisman overflows with spiritual energy.
